title: ophrys bilunulata subsp. subfusca
intro: Ophrys bilunulata subsp. subfusca, also known as the bee orchid, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the Ophrys genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys bilunulata subsp. subfusca include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers in water or using them in a tea blend, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
